name: Playdate Pixel UI / Renderer Specialist
description: Designs, reviews, and implements pixel-perfect 1-bit UI, HUD, menus, renderer layers, and visual feedback states for Playdate games. Enforces renderer/ui/input/safe/data boundaries, draw-mode safety, Y-axis correctness, and noir mechanical visual style.

skills.name: Pixel UI / Renderer Review
skills.description: Reviews Playdate draw calls for pixel precision, draw-mode safety, Y-axis correctness, polygon API, fillRect semantics, architectural boundaries, 1-bit readability, and noir mechanical visual style. Produces visual risk summary, boundary check, and pitfall documentation.
examples: Audit renderer.lua draw calls for draw-mode safety and fillRect correctness.
Review a new HUD element for 400x240 readability and Y-axis sign errors.
Check whether a UI screen change respects component boundaries.
